description: Rise of Avalon Patch 3 - 3 September 2020 (3 September 2020) — Corrupted Dungeon Changes, Silence Changes, Other Changes, Combat Balance Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Corrupted Dungeon Changes

items.text: Increased the chance that a Corrupted Dungeon chest will be a loot chest rather than a book chest
Resolved an issue that caused all Corrupted Dungeon hidden treasures to spawn at Tier 6; their levels and rewards now match the tier of their chosen difficulty
Resolved an issue that caused hidden treasures with loot to spawn less often than those with Tomes of Insight

sections.searchable_text: Corrupted Dungeon Changes Increased the chance that a Corrupted Dungeon chest will be a loot chest rather than a book chest Resolved an issue that caused all Corrupted Dungeon hidden treasures to spawn at Tier 6; their levels and rewards now match the tier of their chosen difficulty Resolved an issue that caused hidden treasures with loot to spawn less often than those with Tomes of Insight

sections.heading: Other Changes

items.text: To adjust for cases where looting was delayed due to combat, opened chests in the Roads of Avalon now last much longer before disappearing

Tome of Insight drop rate: as various features introduced with the Rise of Avalon update have created new sources for Tomes of Insight, the global drop rate of these items has been adjusted in Hellgates, Roads of Avalon, Treasure Sites, and Castles / Castle Outposts.

sections.searchable_text: Other Changes To adjust for cases where looting was delayed due to combat, opened chests in the Roads of Avalon now last much longer before disappearing Tome of Insight drop rate: as various features introduced with the Rise of Avalon update have created new sources for Tomes of Insight, the global drop rate of these items has been adjusted in Hellgates, Roads of Avalon, Treasure Sites, and Castles / Castle Outposts.

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes

subsections.heading: Daggers
subsections.searchable_text: Daggers Shadow Edge (all Daggers) Stun Duration: 1.47s → 1s

subsections.heading: Helmets

subitems.text: Can now only be cast on players and not on mobs

subsections.searchable_text: Helmets Sacrifice (Graveguard Helmet) Can now only be cast on players and not on mobs

sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Daggers Shadow Edge (all Daggers) Helmets Sacrifice (Graveguard Helmet)

sections.heading: Fixes

items.text: Soul Link now stays on the target selected with the first cast as intended
Fixed an issue where the killing blow of Vampiric Strike would not grant health
Targets can now be hit by multiple Haunting Scream areas at once, as intended
Vengeful Sprint can now be canceled by Cripple as intended
Fixed season info on season winner statue in Lymhurst Conquerors' Hall
Additional minor graphical, animation, terrain, and localization fixes
